prompt: I need to understand how React Server Components handle the serialization boundary. Can you dig into the Next.js and React repos to show me how they serialize props across the server/client boundary? I keep hitting a 'cannot pass function to client component' error and want to understand why.

assertions.text: Contains GitHub source links to React or Next.js repo files
Explains what can and cannot cross the server/client serialization boundary
References React Flight protocol or serialization mechanism
Specifically explains why functions cannot be passed to client components
